page_content:
Prerequisite: CHEM131, CHEM135, or CHEM146.

Cross-listed with: AOSC633.

Credit Only Granted for: AOSC433, AOSC633, CHEM433, or CHEM633.

CHEM640 Problems in Organic Reaction Mechanisms (1 Credit) A tutorial type course dealing with the basic description of the fundamentals of writing organic reaction mechanisms.
